vision_report.compositional_truth_check: Registry reconciliation indicates significant divergence from the expected biome state.

inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss (Black Pot appears devoid of healthy Mexican Mint).
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Present (Black Pot with White Rabbit anchor).
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss (No distinct Silver Guest identified).
inventory_reconciliation.Anomalies: Presence of uncatalogued sprout in P3; significant debris/egg-shell fragments in P3.

plant_audit.P1: String of Nickels: Stable, minimal growth observed.
plant_audit.P2: Mexican Mint: Deceased/Lost. Only necrotic remnants visible.
plant_audit.P3: Pothos: Single leaf remaining, showing signs of chlorosis and edge necrosis. White rabbit anchor remains stable.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dry, granular, and slightly compacted.
biome_observations.debris: White eggshell fragments present in P3; electronic cabling visible in P3.

temporal_deltas.T-5_to_T-4: Minor leaf tip browning on P3.
temporal_deltas.T-3_to_T-2: P3 leaf posture remains static; no new growth.
temporal_deltas.T-2_to_T-1: P3 leaf edge necrosis appears to have progressed.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_CURRENT: Stasis observed; no recovery or further degradation.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of advanced decline. P3 is the only surviving specimen, exhibiting signs of severe nutrient or water stress. P2 and P4 are effectively lost.
anomalies: Unidentified green sprout in P3 soil.
Eggshell fragments used as soil amendment/top dressing.
Electronic sensor cabling present in P3.
vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical environment is failing. The Pothos (P3) is the sole remaining occupant of the primary observation pot, and it is struggling with significant leaf necrosis. The Mexican Mint (P2) and Silver Guest (P4) have suffered systemic loss, leaving only barren soil. The presence of eggshells suggests an attempt at intervention, but the lack of moisture and potential root-zone issues have led to a stagnant, declining biome.
